relations.note: Accessibility rule specifies the default on-palette stroke color (Brand Blue) within the broader palette-only constraint on icon color.
Both govern the visual construction of icons (style vs. color) as part of the same iconography topic.

quotes: Style: **minimal line illustration** for clarity and quick recall. New icons are permitted but **must match this stylistic approach** (consistent stroke weight, rounded line caps, single-color line work).

rules.intent: Preserve a consistent, recognizable icon system while allowing new icon creation.
rules.rule_text: All icons use the minimal line illustration style (icon.style = minimal_line_illustration). New icons are permitted but must match this stylistic approach: consistent stroke weight, rounded line caps, and single-color line work.

quotes: Icon colors and backgrounds adjustable **only within the brand palette**.

rules.intent: Keep icon coloring on-brand and prevent palette drift.
rules.rule_text: Icon colors and backgrounds may only be adjusted within the brand palette (e.g. Brand Blue #00529b, Sunshine #faa31b, etc.); no off-palette colors are permitted for icons.

quotes: default Brand Blue strokes on light backgrounds
Consider scale and contrast for low-vision audiences. [GENERAL: minimum render size 32×32px in email; default Brand Blue strokes on light backgrounds.]

rules.intent: Ensure icon legibility and contrast accessibility across viewing conditions.
rules.rule_text: Icons must remain legible for low-vision audiences: consider scale and contrast, render at a minimum size of 32×32px in email, and default to Brand Blue (#00529b) strokes on light backgrounds.
